Request a demo

Security & Compliance

Your facility's data. Protected at every layer.

When you run security operations on SYAG, you're trusting us with sensitive information — guard locations, incident records, visitor identities. We take that responsibility seriously.

Your data is yours. Always isolated.

Every facility on SYAG operates in its own isolated data environment. This is not a configuration option — it is how the platform is built. Your incident logs, visitor records, and guard data are stored in a completely separate database schema from every other customer. No data is ever shared or accessible across tenants.

Infrastructure

Microsoft Azure — enterprise-grade cloud hosting with regional data centres in the UAE and Saudi Arabia available for MEA customers requiring geographic data sovereignty.

  • 99.9% uptime SLA
  • Automated backups
  • Disaster recovery
  • DDoS protection via Azure Front Door

Encryption & access control

Encryption

  • TLS 1.3 for all data in transit
  • AES-256 encryption at rest
  • Passwords hashed with bcrypt

Access control

  • OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect authentication
  • Role-based access: Guard, Supervisor, Admin, Ops Center
  • Every action logged with user identity, timestamp, and IP

Compliance

Saudi NCA

Architecture supports alignment with the National Cybersecurity Authority Essential Controls. Azure Front Door Premium upgrade available for regulated Saudi customers.

UAE IA

Data residency in UAE North Azure region available for customers under UAE Information Assurance requirements.

Full audit trail

Every action on the SYAG platform is logged with user identity, timestamp, and IP address. Complete chain of custody for every incident, visitor record, and configuration change.

Have specific compliance requirements?

Talk to our team — we'll walk you through the architecture.
